title: Enchanted Bookshelves
description: Enchanted Books will glint when put in Chiseled Bookshelves! Give your enchanting room a cosmetic shine!
body:
# ✨ Enchanted Bookshelves🗄️
**Bring your library to life with shimmering magic! Adds a subtle visual effect to Enchanted Books placed in Chiseled Bookshelves**

# 📚 Features
- 📘 **Server & Client** for the effect to work.
- 📙 **Compatible with Vanilla Clients** that don't have the mod.
- 📗 **Vanilla+** by being purely cosmetic.
- 📔 **Compatible with other mods** that add more Chiseled Bookshelves or Enchanted Books.
